subtitle.text: HBM is a system, not a shortcut

description: The current HardTech-HBM subset covers early nuclear-adjacent machines, SI displays, radiation tools, shielding, heat, fluids, steam, and a simple fission heat source.
This gate stays open until current HBM GUIs, JEI categories, radiation HUD/audio, hazmat behavior, reactor-chain persistence, and survival recipe balance are manually inspected.
